calibration_notes: My recent 11 next-day BEARISH predictions were 100% accurate, but all my intraday calls (0% accuracy) failed due to overreacting to short-term volatility spikes. For NVDA specifically, I've been too aggressive on downside targets - adjusting to more conservative ranges. My 80% confidence on all recent trades was too uniform - varying confidence based on signal strength rather than blanket high confidence.
